description: Plugin-owned capability registration and selectable native tools for agent annotation lifecycle management.

userStories.title: Register Web Annotations plugin capability
userStories.description: As a profile author, I want Web Annotations registered as a plugin capability so that it can be selected per agent profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Web Annotations plugin module following existing plugin registry patterns
Register capability catalog metadata for the plugin and the web-annotation-agent-tools package
A profile without the package does not expose Web Annotation tools
A profile with the package exposes Web Annotation tool definitions during runtime assembly
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by pibo.web-annotations plugin registration, web-annotation-agent-tools capability package metadata, default registry inclusion, contextual native tool definitions, and selected/unselected runtime exposure tests. Focused tests, build, and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Implement annotation list and get tools
userStories.description: As an agent, I want to list and inspect annotations for my current session so that I can understand user feedback precisely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement web_annotations_list with current-session default, optional authorized session id, status filter, limit, newest-first ordering, and compact output
Implement web_annotations_get returning full authorized target metadata for one annotation id
Tools derive owner scope from runtime context and never from model input
Tool outputs omit or truncate long fields according to store/output limits
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by web_annotations_list and web_annotations_get tools backed by the durable WebAnnotationStore. Tools derive owner scope from runtime context, default to the current Pibo Session, support authorized explicit session id/status/limit, return newest-first bounded compact list output, and bounded detail metadata. Focused tool authorization/truncation tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Implement annotation lifecycle tools
userStories.description: As an agent, I want to acknowledge, resolve, and dismiss annotations so that annotation state tracks my work.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement web_annotations_acknowledge with optional summary
Implement web_annotations_resolve with required or optional completion summary according to existing tool conventions
Implement web_annotations_dismiss with optional reason
Lifecycle tools enforce owner/session authorization and valid status transitions
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by web_annotations_acknowledge, web_annotations_resolve, and web_annotations_dismiss lifecycle tools. Tools enforce owner/session authorization through runtime context and store scoping, reject terminal/invalid lifecycle transitions, persist summaries/reasons and agent resolvedBy metadata. Focused lifecycle authorization tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Implement bounded annotation watch tool
userStories.description: As an agent, I want to wait briefly for new annotations so that I can support interactive frontend feedback loops.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement web_annotations_watch as a bounded wait or long-poll for new annotations in the current or authorized session
Tool returns new annotations compactly and reports timeout/no-new-annotations without error
If watch can block longer than a short timeout, integrate with Pibo yielded-run control rather than custom run state
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by web_annotations_watch as a bounded short-poll wait with capped timeout and compact output. It returns new annotations when present and reports timedOut/no annotations without error; longer waits can be run through existing run-control because the tool is yieldable. Focused timeout/new-annotation tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Test tool authorization and runtime exposure
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want tests for selected/unselected profile exposure and tool authorization so that capability boundaries remain correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for selected profile exposing Web Annotation tools and unselected profile omitting them
Add tests for empty lists, missing annotation ids, unauthorized owner/session access, and valid lifecycle updates
Add tests for bounded list output and detail truncation where applicable
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by web-annotations tool tests covering selected profile exposure, default unselected profile omission, capability catalog metadata, empty/isolated list behavior, missing/unauthorized ids, bounded output/detail truncation, valid lifecycle updates, and bounded watch behavior. Focused tests, build, and Docker worker typecheck passed.
